one_time_description: BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing Limited Partnership income allocation of $322,105 (first year, no prior year amount)
economic_notes: Michuk Forestry Limited Partnership (99.99% owned, equity method as GBE) reported revenues of $1,472,621 and a net loss of $13,557 in 2020. Skw'akw'iyap Economic Development Corp. and Siska Traditions Society are fully consolidated subsidiaries. Band holds 0.35% interest in BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing Limited Partnership and 12.49% in Qwa'eet Forest Products Limited Partnership.
notes: Auditor name not included in the provided text. No long-term debt reported on balance sheet. GBE (Michuk Forestry Limited Partnership) reported a net loss of $13,557 in 2020 vs income of $120,959 in 2019; equity earnings shown as negative $13,556 in note but income statement shows $68,152 — the $68,152 line appears to be the income from GBE reported in the statement of operations (possibly prior period adjustment or reclassification). Honorarium of $24,763 paid in Band Revenue segment. No schedule of remuneration provided. total_government_transfers includes ISC $2,072,038 + Province of BC $154,967 + CMHC $31,017 = $2,257,022. OSR = $3,254,398 - $2,257,022 = $997,376.
